name: kiro-coco
description: AWS + Snowflake integrated solutions combining Kinesis, Lambda, DynamoDB, and EventBridge with Snowflake Openflow and Snowpipe Streaming. Use when setting up streaming pipelines from AWS to Snowflake, deploying a Kinesis connector, configuring Openflow on SPCS, setting up an Openflow canvas user, or building any AWS-Snowflake integration.
